summary: Auth System Testing Complete - ALL 14 REQUESTED TESTS PASSED. Replaced demo role selector with full authentication system: Login, Register, Forgot Password flows all working correctly with localStorage persistence.

mocked_api.details: Auth is localStorage based (je_auth_users, je_auth_session) - NOT real backend API

seed_data_creation: None required - users created via registration form
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system complete. Old WelcomeScreen removed, / route shows AuthScreen. localStorage keys: je_auth_users (array of registered users), je_auth_session (current session). Register creates student role. To access student features, register first or login with existing credentials. Profile page has 'Cerrar sesión' button for logout. All data-testid attributes working as expected.
